docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUSRIF, BALA DBA EVENTBEE, INC.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUSRIF, BALA DBA EVENTBEE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELEMENT, LLC $2,978.43 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,103.43, CLAIM AGAINST STEVE CHEN IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. ELEMENT, LLC IS ADDED AS AN ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT BY AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. STEVE CHEN WAIVES SERVICE ON BEHALF OF ELEMENT, LLC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED JAN-06-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, STEVE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-15-2011 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MUSRIF, BALA DBA EVENTBEE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, STEVE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-15-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-15-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-15-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO STEVE CHEN BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-15-2011 AT 10:00AM.
